core_mechanism: derivation of power-law scaling exponents for a transport coefficient by balancing a global dissipation/flux budget partitioned between a thin boundary-layer region and the bulk interior of the medium
brief_reason: The abstract obtains how the transport number scales with dimensionless control parameters by summing the energy-dissipation rates contributed separately by the bulk and the boundary layers, which is a boundary-layer/bulk dissipation-budget balance yielding power laws.
